title: Workshop: Build a Captioned Safety-Briefing Player
summary: Workshop: Build a Captioned Safety-Briefing Player uses an original safety briefing player build scenario to retrieve earlier HTML skills, add a bounded artifact layer, and verify transfer with source and browser evidence.
objectives: Retrieve html text headings lists, html video without step-by-step imitation.
Produce and verify a real safety briefing player build artifact or evidence report.
Preserve earlier valid requirements while diagnosing changed content and constraints.

options.text: Safety briefing player build case 3: heading rank is a font-size control, so smaller-looking sections should always use h6.
Safety briefing player build case 3: select text elements for the relationship they communicate, then use CSS later for visual scale.
Safety briefing player build case 3: every sentence should be a heading because headings receive stronger default styling.
